project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 用户名、密码、确认密码、邮箱地址和验证码数据
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户创建账户时，用户名、密码、确认密码、可选邮箱地址和验证码通过API POST请求发送到MediaWiki服务器进行createaccount认证

flow_steps.code: public func createAccount(username: String, password: String, retypePassword: String, email: String?, classicCaptchaID: String?, classicCaptchaWord: String?, hCaptchaToken: String?, siteURL: URL, success: @escaping WMFAccountCreatorResultBlock, failure: @escaping WMFErrorHandler)
flow_steps.details: 账户创建流程触发，接收用户名、密码、确认密码和可选邮箱

flow_steps.code:
var parameters: [String: String] = [
    "action": "createaccount",
    "username": username,
    "password": password,
    "retype": retypePassword,
    "createreturnurl": "https://www.wikipedia.org",
    "createmessageformat": "html",
    "format": "json"
]
flow_steps.details: 将用户名、密码、确认密码等组装到API请求参数中
可选邮箱地址被添加到请求参数中

flow_steps.code: performTokenizedMediaWikiAPIPOST(tokenType: .createAccount, to: siteURL, with: parameters) { (result, response, error) in
flow_steps.details: 用户名、密码、确认密码、邮箱和验证码通过HTTPS POST发送到Wiki服务器（如en.wikipedia.org）的API端点进行createaccount操作

flow_steps.code:
let normalizedUsername = createaccount["username"] as? String ?? username
success(WMFAccountCreatorResult.init(status: status, username: normalizedUsername, message: message?.text ?? ""))
flow_steps.details: API返回创建结果，包含标准化用户名，结果回调给UI层展示

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 创建账户前检查用户名是否可用，用户名通过API GET请求发送到MediaWiki服务器

flow_steps.details: 检查用户名可用性流程触发
将用户名组装到查询参数中
用户名通过GET请求发送到MediaWiki API的query+users端点，查询用户是否可创建

flow_steps.code: performTokenizedMediaWikiAPIPOST(tokenType: .login, to: siteURL, with: parameters, reattemptLoginOn401Response: reattemptOn401Response)

登录成功后用户名和密码被存储到iOS Keychain

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 账户创建过程中记录开始和成功事件到EventPlatformClient

flow_steps.code:
public func logCreateAccountAttempt(category: EventCategoryMEP?) {
    logEvent(category: category ?? .login, label: nil, action: .createAccountStart)
flow_steps.details: 用户开始创建账户时触发分析事件

flow_steps.code:
public func logCreateAccountSuccess(category: EventCategoryMEP?, timeElapsed: Double?) {
    logEvent(category: category ?? .login, label: nil, action: .createAccountSuccess, measure: timeElapsed)
flow_steps.details: 账户创建成功时触发分析事件，包含耗时数据
